narrative:
New Philadelphia City has 10,258 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
